meta.notes: Example direction inventory for a greenfield SaaS homepage.

selected_concept.selected_reason: Best balance of concrete product hierarchy and durable visual-system potential.

visual_direction: Quiet operational SaaS with crisp cards, dense but calm information hierarchy, restrained blue-green accents, and high-legibility UI typography.

hierarchy.primary: Hero headline, product value proposition, and primary signup CTA.
hierarchy.secondary: Feature cards, metrics preview, and proof points.
hierarchy.notes: The concept relies on scannable operational content rather than atmospheric storytelling.

color_candidates: Pale neutral canvas with white elevated surfaces.
Blue primary action color with green success/accent highlights.
Dark inverse footer surface for terminal contrast.
type_character: Modern geometric headings with moderate compression.
Neutral UI sans body text optimized for dashboards and dense cards.
Monospace used only for compact telemetry or code-like labels.
layout_observations: Twelve-column desktop rhythm with compact section spacing.
Hero pairs a text block with a product preview card.
Feature cards need equal-height bodies and bottom-aligned actions.

component_families.name: header-navigation
component_families.notes: Needs desktop inline links and mobile drawer behavior.

component_families.name: buttons-links
component_families.notes: Primary, secondary, ghost, focus, hover, disabled.

component_families.name: feature-cards
component_families.notes: Shared header/body/action anatomy with equal heights.

component_families.name: footer
component_families.notes: Link columns, compact legal row, recognizable social icons.

asset_manifest_seed.name: hero-product-preview
asset_manifest_seed.notes: Can be implemented with HTML/CSS instead of raster.

asset_manifest_seed.name: footer-social-icons
asset_manifest_seed.notes: Use recognizable inline SVG icons with accessible names.

responsive_implications: Primary navigation needs a menu toggle and stacked mobile panel.
Hero product preview should stack under the copy on narrow screens.
Cards collapse from three columns to one column with preserved action alignment.
accessibility_risks: Accent text over tinted cards needs AA contrast checks.
Compact telemetry labels may become too small on mobile.
ambiguities: The exact heading font is not identifiable from the concept.
Some preview chart details should be simplified into real CSS/SVG rather than copied literally.
page_local_candidates: Hero glow treatment should remain page-local unless reused on another page.
One-off telemetry background pattern should not become a global token.
normalization_notes: Brand board should preserve the operational SaaS direction while extracting durable palette, typography, spacing, radius, surface, and state rules.
Design-system tokens should snap approximate concept spacing to a deliberate scale.
Critical component work should prioritize header/nav, buttons, cards, section shell, and footer before broader library expansion.
